executive_verdict.primary_failure_mode: blocked-channel-recovery still timing out (live cron error); architecture verifier/checker green; 3 escalations active (blocked-channel-recovery 925r, agent_architecture_verifier_runtime 748r, docs_agentic_review 201r); marketing independent verification still fail-closed on measurable outcome evidence
executive_verdict.most_urgent_fix: Diagnose and fix blocked-channel-recovery timeout (600s budget, actual 326s — likely hanging on network call); second priority: clear marketing independent verification with measurable Codeberg-primary adoption evidence

audit_metadata.scheduler_inspection_method: direct openclaw cron list --json plus live artifact cross-checks
live_job_names: Push research findings to git repo

findings.title: blocked-channel-recovery cron job is still timing out — NOT cleared
findings.mechanism: Live cron shows 1 error: blocked-channel-recovery timed out (600s budget, 326s actual). Prior watchdog run incorrectly claimed this was cleared. Escalation active at 925 repeats.
findings.root_cause: Script is hanging — likely a blocking network call or infinite wait in the blocked-channel-recovery logic.
findings.recommended_fix: Inspect blocked-channel-recovery script for blocking calls; add timeout guards on individual network operations; consider splitting into faster single-channel checks.

findings.title: Marketing independent verification still fail-closed on outcome evidence
findings.mechanism: Marketing independent verification verdict = 'fail'. Blocking reason: no measurable Codeberg-primary adoption movement captured in shared artifact.
findings.root_cause: Outcome evidence for Codeberg-primary adoption is still measurement-pending.
findings.recommended_fix: Marketing owner loop must produce fresh measurable outcome evidence before the whole stack can certify green.

findings.title: 3 escalations active — blocked-channel-recovery (925r), agent_architecture_verifier_runtime (748r), docs_agentic_review (201r)
findings.mechanism: Health monitor has tripped escalation thresholds on three independent issues. All enqueued to owner loops but none resolved yet.
findings.root_cause: Repeated failure buildup across multiple domains; each escalation is independently correct but the combined signal represents systemic fragility.
findings.recommended_fix: Triage each escalation independently: blocked-channel-recovery needs script diagnosis; verifier_runtime needs timestamp coherency fix; docs_agentic_review needs mustFix resolution.

findings.title: Architecture verifier/checker/independent-verify gate is green
findings.mechanism: Checker returns AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Verifier returns ok (after re-running independent verification to clear timestamp drift). Independent verifier returns qualified_pass with external blockers correctly isolated.
findings.root_cause: Architecture-side gates are coherent and fail-closed correctly on stale or missing evidence.
findings.recommended_fix: Maintain current verifier freshness-gate behavior; ensure timestamp coherency between architecture refresh and independent verification runs.

findings.title: 2 docs_agentic_review mustFix items enqueued to ralph-workflow-docs-verifier-supervisor
findings.mechanism: Health monitor shows two unresolved mustFix items: (1) Add START_HERE.md to primary Codeberg repo root, (2) Swap install ordering in Codeberg README to pipx first. Both enqueued to owner loop.
findings.root_cause: Docs review identified actionable improvements that haven't been applied to the primary repo yet.
findings.recommended_fix: ralph-workflow-docs-verifier-supervisor should apply the two mustFix items in its next run.

findings.title: Agent architecture verifier had timestamp-drift false negative; fixed by re-running independent verification
findings.mechanism: After refreshing agent_architecture_latest.json, the verifier detected the independent verification artifact as predating newer evidence. Re-running independent verification cleared this. Root cause: write-then-verify ordering.
findings.root_cause: agent_architecture_latest.json mtime updated before independent verification re-ran, creating a spurious staleness check failure.
findings.recommended_fix: The watchdog should run independent verification AFTER refreshing artifacts, or the verifier should tolerate a small timestamp window.

findings.title: Loop integrity remains green for both tracked loops
findings.mechanism: ralph-docs-watchdog status=ok, agent-architecture-watchdog status=ok with verifierContractExternalized=true.
findings.root_cause: Loop integrity audit is working correctly and detecting no overlap or ownership drift.
findings.recommended_fix: No action needed — maintain current loop integrity contract.

findings.title: pypi-auto-unblocker has no self-improvement mandate
findings.mechanism: Script has no self-improvement mandate. When outcomes are flat, this loop will repeat the same tactics forever.
findings.root_cause: Loop was created without a self-improvement mandate or third-party verification.
findings.recommended_fix: Add self-improvement mandate with flat-outcome detection, redesign triggers, and independent signoff requirement.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Diagnose and fix blocked-channel-recovery timeout — the only live cron error
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 925-repeat escalation is active; live cron shows the job still timing out at 326s. This is the highest-risk unresolved runtime issue.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clear the single live cron error and de-escalate the highest-repeat incident.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Clear agent_architecture_verifier_runtime escalation by ensuring timestamp coherency
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 748 repeats; verifier now passes after re-running independent verification, but the escalation artifact may still be stale in health monitor.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Remove architectural noise from the escalation dashboard.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Apply 2 docs_agentic_review mustFix items (START_HERE.md on Codeberg, README install ordering)
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: 201 repeats on escalation; items are enqueued to owner loop but not yet applied.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Clear the docs escalation and improve primary-repo onboarding experience.

ordered_fix_plan.goal: Get fresh marketing independent pass with measurable Codeberg-primary adoption evidence
ordered_fix_plan.why_now: Marketing still blocks whole-stack certification; architecture-owned gates are coherent.
ordered_fix_plan.expected_effect: Either clears the remaining adoption blocker or preserves truthful fail-closed outcome ownership.

repairs_applied_this_run.change: Refreshed audit against live cron state: 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 1 error (blocked-channel-recovery timeout). Previous run incorrectly claimed 0 errors — this was a factual error corrected in this refresh.

Verifier was reporting false-negative because independent verification artifact mtime predated architecture artifact refresh. Re-ran independent verification to restore coherency. Verifier now returns ok.
Checker: AGENT_ARCHITECTURE_OK. Independent verifier: qualified_pass (external blockers isolated correctly). Verifier: ok (post-repair).

repairs_applied_this_run.target: live error state claim in prior watchdog run
repairs_applied_this_run.change: Prior run claimed 'blocked-channel-recovery timeout cleared' and '0 live errors'. Live cron shows 1 error: blocked-channel-recovery still timing out. Corrected in this artifact.

independent_verification.summary: Independent verification confirms the repaired architecture verifier now fails closed on stale signoff, the live loop topology/ownership checks remain green, and shared market-intelligence reuse stays machine-verifiable.

what_still_needs_independent_verificatio: Fresh marketing independent pass backed by measurable primary-repo movement.
Health monitor refresh to clear stale escalations after repairs are applied.

highest_risk_unresolved_issue.title: blocked-channel-recovery timeout — 925-repeat escalation, 1 live cron error
highest_risk_unresolved_issue.why: The only live cron error in the system. Script is hanging at ~326s against a 600s budget. 925-repeat escalation means this has been failing for a very long time. Architecture-owned gates are green but this runtime error could cascade into channel delivery failures.

notes: Architecture green = architecture-owned verifier/checker/independent-verify path is coherent. Does not mean whole stack is green.
Prior watchdog run had a factual error: claimed blocked-channel-recovery timeout was cleared and 0 live errors. Live cron shows 1 error. Corrected here.
Independent live inspection: 24 jobs, 24 enabled, 0 disabled, 0 running, 1 error (blocked-channel-recovery).
Health monitor has 9 issues (up from 4 in prior run snapshot) including 3 active escalations (925r, 748r, 201r).
Verifier timestamp-drift false-negative repaired by re-running independent verification after artifact refresh.
blocked-channel-recovery 925-repeat escalation is the most critical unresolved issue — it's the only live cron error and has been failing for a very long time.
No live timeout-budget repair was applied in this watchdog run.
